title: crotalaria cuspidata
intro: Crotalaria cuspidata, also known as the needle bush or yellow rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is widely used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria cuspidata include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria cuspidata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
